actions.text:
Hi Lisa,

Thank you for reaching out about the mobile app development project. I’m excited about the chance to work with you on a React Native solution. Could you share more details about the app’s core features, target platforms (iOS/Android), and any design guidelines or timelines you have in mind? This will help me craft a proposal that fits your needs.

Best regards,
Jordan
